metadata.title: Can't Help Falling in Love
metadata.lyrics:
[00:07.59] Wise men say
[00:14.03] Only fools rush in
[00:21.32] But I can't help
[00:27.17] Falling in love with you
[00:36.09] Shall I stay
[00:42.10] Would it be a sin?
[00:50.21] If I can't help
[00:55.92] Falling in love with you?
[01:04.62] Like a river flows
[01:08.50] Surely to the sea
[01:11.99] Darling, so it goes
[01:15.26] Some things are meant to be
[01:22.76] Take my hand
[01:28.94] Take my whole life too
[01:36.51] For I can't help
[01:42.37] Falling in love with you
[01:51.31] Like a river flows
[01:55.12] Surely to the sea
[01:58.34] Darling, so it goes
[02:01.74] Some things are meant to be
[02:08.91] Take my hand
[02:14.96] Take my whole life too
[02:22.88] For I can't help
[02:28.44] Falling in love with you
